Appearances:
Plaintiff Community Housing Partnership is present. Represented by Georgett Brown.
Attorney Paige Simmons for the plaintiff.
Defendant Leslie Blueford is present.
Attorney Erin Katayama appearing for defendant in full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of October 24, 2016 is vacated. (501/jpt)
